basics.name: namePrefix
basics.label: Resource name prefix
basics.toolTip: Short prefix for all resource names (2-8 lowercase alphanumeric characters). Use something unique per deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: Prefix must be 2-8 lowercase alphanumeric characters.

options.text: Your Campfire session token authenticates cf-mcp with the Campfire protocol network. Obtain one by running `cf register` with your operator identity.

elements.name: cfSessionToken
elements.toolTip: The CF_SESSION_TOKEN for your cf-mcp instance. This is stored as an encrypted app setting in Azure Functions.

elements.name: cfDomain
elements.label: Public hostname (optional)
elements.toolTip: Custom hostname for your cf-mcp endpoint (e.g. campfire.example.com). Leave blank to use the Azure-assigned hostname.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid hostname or left blank.

elements.name: storageSku
elements.label: Storage redundancy
elements.toolTip: Storage account replication. LRS is lowest cost; ZRS provides zone redundancy; GRS replicates to a paired region.

elements.name: enableMonitoring
elements.label: Enable monitoring (Application Insights + Log Analytics)
elements.toolTip: Deploys Application Insights and a Log Analytics workspace for function telemetry and diagnostics. Adds ~$2-5/month at low volumes.
